chunk_summaries: Wilson Smith asked a clarifying question about whether biomass conversions, such as glycerol or HMF oxidation, are considered negative emissions or just end-product up-conversion by funders. The discussion was exploratory, with no other participants speaking or showing visible reactions. The chunk ended with this open question regarding the scope and funding alignment of these processes.
